title: conostylis deplexa
intro: Conostylis deplexa, also known as the Western Cone Button or Button Cone, is a flowering plant species native to Western Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Conostylis deplexa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and treat digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Conostylis deplexa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and can also be used as a poultice or topical application for skin conditions.
